message:
fix(fcp-raptorq,fcp-store): Address clippy lints and potential division issue

fcp-raptorq/envelope.rs:
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to encrypt() with comment
  explaining all parameters are required for envelope construction
- Add #[allow(clippy::trivially_copy_pass_by_ref)] to derive_sender_subkey
  for API consistency with sibling crates
- Fix doc comment formatting for HKDF info string parameters

fcp-store/repair.rs:
- Replace division with checked_div() in RateLimiter::try_acquire() to
  handle edge cases cleanly using if-let binding
- Use sort_by_key with std::cmp::Reverse for priority sorting instead
  of manual comparison closure, improving readability

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
